concerns.analysis: On page 2, the footer text 'Geoportal Website:' (reading_order 7) is placed before the primary content list 'Natural Heritage Program' (reading_order 9-10). The list items 'Ongoing' and 'Upcoming' are present, but their entire sub-structures (e.g., 'Infrastructure buildout', 'Replicate data...', 'EPA parcels project...', 'Elevation download...', 'Website redesign...') are completely omitted from the output. This is a critical structural failure that loses the vast majority of the source document's informational value.
